title: fix: stop app review label reruns
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Stops the pre-review workflow from reacting to label changes
- Keeps automatic review on issue creation and edits, plus manual dispatch
- Prevents state labels from starting skipped runs that cancel successful reviews

Root cause:
The workflow-level concurrency rule was evaluated before the job-level label filter, so APP-SUBMISSION and APP-NEEDS-INFO events cancelled active runs.

Checks:
- YAML syntax validation
- Trigger-shape verification
- git diff --check

gist.headline: Reviews stop swatting themselves
gist.blurb: The app-review hive now ignores its own state-label fluttering. Successful reviews can finish their work without a skipped run barging in and cancelling them.
gist.summary: Updated the app submission pre-review workflow to ignore label-change events while retaining automatic reviews on issue creation and edits plus manual dispatch, preventing APP-SUBMISSION and APP-NEEDS-INFO labels from cancelling active reviews.
gist.impact: App contributors will get more reliable automatic submission reviews, since state-label updates no longer replace successful in-progress runs with skipped ones.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as a careful review gardener tending a healthy app-submission code plant while friendly label-tags drift harmlessly past a protected retro review terminal; the terminal shows a completed checkmark rather than being interrupted. Use small flowers and vines to represent submissions continuing smoothly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light-blue wings, and tiny librarian glasses, tending a blooming code-plant beside a retro CRT review terminal glowing lime green (#ecf874) with a large pixel checkmark; harmless little label tags float past without disturbing it. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel mint-lavender-cream gradients, warm lighting, garden flowers and vines, subtle pixel-font text: 'REVIEW COMPLETE', retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
